text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
67 
CLM_FAC_TYPE_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim Facility Type Code 
DESCRIPTION: The type of facility. 
SHORT NAME: FAC_TYPE 
LONG NAME: CLM_FAC_TYPE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
1 = Hospital 
2 = Skilled nursing facility (SNF) 
3 = Home health agency (HHA) 
4 = Religious Non-medical (hospital) 
6 = Intermediate Care (IMC) 
7 = Clinic services or hospital-based
